patient_summary: Olivia, age 73, female (multiple documents list Female; one document lists Legal Sex Male 06/19/2013), primary identifiers: Patient ID 104, phone +1 310 556 1256. Active problem list includes mixed dyslipidemia, essential hypertension (benign), postoperative/unpecified anemia, and leg pain; Piedmont documents hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus. Major recent procedure scheduled/performed: colonoscopy with biopsy on 02/21/2025 (Haroon, Mustafa, MD). Key abnormal labs: 07/03/2023 ferritin 266.8 (H), iron 41 (L), iron saturation 15% (L), triglycerides 158 (H), eGFR CKD-EPI 58 (L). Prior labs include elevated glucose 199 on 01/11/2021 and lipid panel entries. Functional and smoking history entries conflict across records. Care team includes primary care (Hand, Hoyet A, MD; Hershey, Curtis L, MD) and multiple specialists (cardiology, endocrinology, oncology).
